If a malicious workspace has a name containing path traversal characters, pathlib resolves the path outside the intended output directory, allowing an attacker to write arbitrary files to the user's system.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00251, "percentile": 0.16141}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-12568"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T23:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security/advisories/GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12568", "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/commit/36bc20818", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security-advisories/GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot", "summary": "BBOT: Arbitrary File Write in postman_download Module", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m54h-vhf9-3w3m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "bbot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.1.0, <= 2.8.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
